arts.ttl: Arne Slot insists Nottingham Forest ARE genuine title contenders after their flying start to the season - as Liverpool boss prepares for trip to the City Ground
arts.sum: DOMINIC KING: Arne Slot has outlined the task Liverpool face in Nottingham on Tuesday as he insisted high-flying Forest are genuine title challengers.

arts.ttl: Liverpool could sacrifice player Jurgen Klopp thinks is 'special' in huge swap deal
arts.sum: Liverpool hold a bargaining chip over their Premier League rivals should they pursue their transfer interest in Bournemouth's Antoine Semenyo, who could be part of a swap deal

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Slot insists Nottingham Forest are title contenders
arts.sum: Arne Slot has insisted Nottingham Forest are Premier League title contenders as Liverpool prepare to face Forest this week. Liverpool make the trip to high-flying Forest on Tuesday evening in a clash that has taken on significance this season. arts.ttl: Roy Keane faces embarrassment again for Trent Alexander-Arnold dig after attack backfired
arts.sum: Roy Keane may find himself embarrassed over his comments on Trent Alexander-Arnold during Liverpool's recent clash with Manchester United - citing how the full-back looked League Two quality

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends Wataru Endo message as special Liverpool training programmes explained
arts.sum: Wataru Endo has played a key part in Liverpool's past several games and his boss has been impressed

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfers: Club eyeing Reds attacker to replace their €80m star man
arts.sum: Napoli are on the verge of losing Khvicha Kvaratskhelia after he expressed a desire of a move away from the club and they could target a Liverpool player to replace him. arts.ttl: Liverpool without two players for Nottingham Forest as Arne Slot admits return is 'quite far' away
arts.sum: Liverpool are without Joe Gomez and the suspended Darwin Nunez for the Premier League clash against Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: Aston Villa enquire into Liverpool target Loïc Badé
arts.sum: According to a report from L’Équipe, Aston Villa have made enquiries into Sevilla’s Loïc Badé (24), while the English media suggest that Newcastle and Liverpool are also interested in the…

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes 'incredible' Arsenal claim as 'big worry' emerges in title race with Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool's title rivals Arsenal were dumped out of the FA Cup by Manchester United and suffered another injury

arts.ttl: Liverpool recall forward from loan spell as Reds hatch new plan for star who 'has fire'
arts.sum: Liverpool have bought Kaide Gordon back to Anfield after his unsuccessful loan stint at Norwich City but plan to send the young winger straight back out on loan
